from source import lcs_length

def test_lcs_length_reveals_dp_column_bug():
    # This test fails on the buggy code because the DP update uses dp[i-1, j] instead of dp[i-1, j-1]
    # when characters match, incorrectly inflating the result.
    result = lcs_length("ABCBDAB", "BDCAB")
    expected = 4  # LCS is "BCAB" or "BDAB"
    assert result == expected, (
        f"Expected LCS length {expected} for 'ABCBDAB' and 'BDCAB', "
        f"but got {result}. The buggy DP update chains the same column, "
        f"causing an inflated value."
    )
